final:
module dram_cell (
    input wire we,           // Write enable
    input wire re,           // Read enable
    input wire [3:0] data_in, // 4-bit data input
    output reg [3:0] data_out // 4-bit data output
);
    reg [3:0] cell_value; // Internal cell_value for the DRAM cell

    always @(*) begin
        if (we) begin
            cell_value = data_in; // Write to cell_value
        end
    end

    always @(posedge re) begin
        if (re) begin
            data_out = cell_value; // Read from cell_value
        end
    end
endmodule
